title: Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer
description: When both of you have status — how to protect the relationship and the truth.
summary_pt_br: Feedback entre pares: peça permissão, nomeie comportamento, descreva impacto, ofereça leitura, espere resposta.

scenes.chapter: Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer
scenes.subtitle_en: When both of you have status — how to protect the relationship and the truth.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Feedback entre pares: peça permissão, nomeie comportamento, descreva impacto, ofereça leitura, espere resposta.

scenes.text_en: When both of you have status — how to protect the relationship and the truth. Focus: giving hard feedback to a peer. Can I share something I noticed? Only if you have bandwidth for it.
scenes.text_pt: Feedback entre pares: peça permissão, nomeie comportamento, descreva impacto, ofereça leitura, espere resposta. Foco: giving hard feedback to a peer. Posso compartilhar algo? Só se tiver espaço.

scenes.title: Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer
scenes.body_en: Peer feedback: ASK permission. NAME the specific behavior. DESCRIBE the impact. OFFER your reading. LEAVE space for their response. No advice until they ask.
scenes.body_pt: Feedback entre pares: peça permissão, nomeie comportamento, descreva impacto, ofereça leitura, espere resposta.

examples.en: Can I share something I noticed? Only if you have bandwidth for it.
examples.pt: Posso compartilhar algo? Só se tiver espaço.

examples.en: In Monday's meeting, when you spoke over Elena three times...
examples.pt: Na segunda, quando você sobrepôs a Elena três vezes...

examples.en: My reading is it came across as dismissive, though I may be wrong.
examples.pt: Minha leitura é que pareceu dispensador, posso estar errada.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer

exercise.question: Complete: "Can I share ___ I noticed? Only if you have bandwidth for it."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Can I share something I noticed? Only if you have bandwidth for it."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Posso compartilhar algo? Só se tiver espaço.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
In Monday's meeting, when you spoke over Elena three times...
exercise.explanation: Correct: "In Monday's meeting, when you spoke over Elena three times..."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Na segunda, quando você sobrepôs a Elena três vezes...

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre giving hard feedback to a peer. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Zara — your peer needs feedback. Open.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Can I share something? Only if you have bandwidth.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: In Monday's meeting, you spoke over Elena three times.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My reading is it came across as dismissive.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I may be wrong — I'm sharing my reading only.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What would feel right to you to try?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Peer feedback lives or dies in the first sentence.

scenes.title: The one-on-one
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four peer-feedback moves. Use at least three feedback terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On a quiet Thursday afternoon, Zara asked a peer for thirty minutes to share something she had been sitting with all week.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Can I share something I noticed about Monday's meeting? Only if you have the bandwidth for it right now.

paragraphs.speaker: Peer
paragraphs.en: Yes, please — I trust your read on these things more than almost anyone else on the leadership team.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: When you spoke over Elena three separate times, my reading is it came across as dismissive — though I may be wrong.

paragraphs.speaker: Peer
paragraphs.en: I didn't realize. What would feel right to try next time without overcorrecting into passivity?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Peer feedback, Zara believed, lives or dies in the first sentence — and in the pause that follows it.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer". When both of you have status — how to protect the relationship and the truth. Can I share something I noticed? Only if you have bandwidth for it. In Monday's meeting, when you spoke over Elena three times... Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer
check.explanation: She says the title: "Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Giving Hard Feedback to a Peer".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
